/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.0 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o librender_core.dylib -install_name @rpath/librender_core.dylib CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/html_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/style_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/paint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/xcm_rgba_raster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/xcm_input_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/exports.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/xcm_tui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/xcm_http_fetch.cpp.o
